narrative: USD mixed as Iran war concerns ease — EUR/USD firms at 1.1798 on ECB President Lagarde's comments; GBP/USD holds near 1.3566. USD/JPY pressured at 158.82 as JPY's safe-haven function appears compromised, while AUD/USD gains to 0.7127 on RBA hiking expectations. Gold higher +0.32% on lingering geopolitical uncertainty, equities rise +1.18% and VIX at 18.4.
